# Suggested Labels

Create these labels in GitHub for Legacy Player.

## Core labels

- architecture
- runtime
- adapter
- game-pack
- server
- tools
- docs
- research

## Work-type labels

- bug
- enhancement
- investigation
- design
- bootstrap
- milestone
- first-target
- diagnostics
- replay
- desync
- compatibility

## Priority labels

- priority:high
- priority:medium
- priority:low

## Status labels

- status:blocked
- status:ready
- status:in-progress
- status:needs-design
- status:needs-validation
